title: Pauli State Preparation
description: Pauli-word state preparation fits Pauli rotation weights and emits a circuit that prepares the requested target state.

params.help: Psi is the target quantum state vector. It must be a non-zero one-dimensional vector with length less than or equal to 2**target_qubits; shorter vectors are padded with zeros.
params.name: Psi
params.info: 请输入非零一维态向量，长度不超过 2^target_qubits（如 [1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0j]）

params.help: Number of target qubits used to prepare Psi. The Pauli optimization cost grows quickly as this value increases.
params.name: target_qubits
params.info: 请输入正整数，且 2^target_qubits 不小于 Psi 的长度；Pauli 方法量子位数较大时会更慢

params.help: Allowed state-preparation error tolerance. It must be positive.
params.name: target_error
params.info: 请输入正数误差阈值（如 1e-6）
